contract.goal: Create the empty-but-loadable plugins/linear-loom/ plugin so subsequent phases (3-6) have a real target. Phase 2 = scaffolding only; no verb wiring, no Linear API calls — just shape.
acceptance_criteria: plugins/linear-loom/.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists with name 'linear-loom' and a personal-CLI-scope description.
Directory skeletons present: cli/, skills/, bin/, agents/, contracts/. Empty dirs preserved via .gitkeep.
plugins/linear-loom/bin/linear-loom is an executable bash shim mirroring plugins/loom/bin/loom (symlink-safe SHIM_DIR, Node >= 24 enforcement, error prefix linear-loom-shim-error:).

plugins/linear-loom/cli/linear-loom.ts is a minimal entrypoint: --help lists 14 namespaces; unknown namespace → unknown-namespace error with candidates; known namespace + verb → structured not-implemented error.
.claude-plugin/marketplace.json registers linear-loom with dependencies ['commons', 'guild'] (per DESIGN.md § 17 — no loom, no griot).
plugins/commons/cli/marketplace-manifest.test.ts's EXPECTED_PLUGIN_NAMES list includes 'linear-loom' so the marketplace-shape test stays green.
linear-loom --help runs; npm test passes (645 tests).
rules_applied: DESIGN.md § 3 (CLI verb surface mirrors loom 1:1) drives namespace registry.
DESIGN.md § 17 (ev-linear fork) confirms linear-loom dependencies = commons + guild only.
DESIGN.md § 7 / § 8 (Linear-native check-ins; no events.jsonl) reflected in namespace registry's verb descriptions.
No tsconfig.json introduced — Node 22+ TS-stripping handles .ts at runtime; matches loom/guild/griot convention.
disqualifiers: Wiring any actual verb logic (Phase 3-6 territory).
Adding loom or griot to linear-loom's dependencies (§ 17 forbids).
Introducing a tsconfig.json in the plugin tree (none of the other plugins have one).
Documentation files (README, SETUP) — those are U3.
inputs: plugins/loom/bin/loom (structural reference for the bash shim)
plugins/loom/cli/loom.ts (structural reference for the namespace registry pattern)

actions: Surveyed plugins/loom/ layout: .claude-plugin/plugin.json carries name+description; marketplace.json carries source + dependencies; bin/ holds bash shim; cli/ holds .ts entrypoint.
Wrote plugins/linear-loom/.claude-plugin/plugin.json with name 'linear-loom' and a description capturing personal-CLI scope + guild composition (the Round-2 fork excises griot per § 18).
Wrote plugins/linear-loom/bin/linear-loom — direct mirror of loom's shim with 'loom' → 'linear-loom' substitutions in entry path, error prefix, and version-check messages. chmod +x to set mode 0755.

Wrote plugins/linear-loom/cli/linear-loom.ts — minimal entrypoint with the full 14-namespace registry per DESIGN.md § 3 + § 10 + § 12 (project, phase, checkin, task, events, session, retro, pr, doctor, plan, revise-plan, research, configure, tasks). Each namespace description includes the Phase-N pointer for the wiring phase. Implements --help, unknown-namespace error with candidates list, and not-implemented dispatcher with structured JSON payload.
Created empty-dir markers: plugins/linear-loom/{agents,skills,contracts}/.gitkeep (docs/ already existed with DESIGN.md).
Updated .claude-plugin/marketplace.json: added linear-loom entry between loom and ev with dependencies ['commons', 'guild'] (per § 17 fork — no loom, no griot).
Updated plugins/commons/cli/marketplace-manifest.test.ts EXPECTED_PLUGIN_NAMES tuple to include 'linear-loom' so the parameterized marketplace-shape test stays green.

Verified: linear-loom --help runs and lists all 14 namespaces; project read returns structured not-implemented error with exit 2; unknown namespace returns unknown-namespace error with candidates; npm test passes (645 tests, was 638 pre-change — +7 from the marketplace test iterating over the new plugin).

Ran panel: derive-panel returned contract-fit + react-api + test-unit + naming. All four returned approved. React-api was non-applicable (no React imports in the Node CLI .ts), surfaced to the evaluator with the carve-out reasoning.

changes_since_previous: Second unit on this branch. U1 reconciled the project manifest with the 8-phase PLAN.md decomposition so Phase 2 could be addressed by loom verbs. This unit lays the scaffold the rest of Phase 2 (U3 docs) and Phases 3-6 (verb implementations) build on.
notes_for_pr: Plugin loads cleanly via marketplace shape test (npm test passes); plugin.json carries name + description; marketplace.json registers with commons + guild deps only (no loom, no griot — per DESIGN.md § 17 fork).
Bash shim mirrors plugins/loom/bin/loom exactly, with 'loom' → 'linear-loom' substitution throughout. Node >= 24 requirement matches the family-wide constraint.

CLI namespace registry covers the full 14-namespace surface from DESIGN.md § 3 + § 10 + § 12. Phase 3-6 each wire some subset. Each description carries a Phase-N pointer so the wiring sequence is visible at --help time.

Phase-3 follow-up surfaced by contract-fit evaluator (observation, not a flag): unknown-namespace and not-implemented currently both exit with code 2. Distinct error classes might warrant distinct exit codes for shell consumers; Phase 3 can refine when real verbs land and the error taxonomy stabilises.

Editor-side TypeScript diagnostic noise about 'cannot find name node:util / process' on the new .ts file matches the same noise visible on existing loom/guild/griot .ts files — repo-wide tsconfig/types posture is unchanged. Node 22+ TS-stripping at runtime is unaffected. Not a Phase-2 concern.
